name: Labriola Cafe
teaser: Thinner, bread-ier crust than other places while still maintaining all the qualities you want from Chicago gut bombs.
review: I think it's got a thinner, bread-ier crust than other places while still maintaining all the other qualities you want from Chicago gut bombs.
headsUp: Thinner, breadier crust than the competition. A sleeper pick.
update: Consistent and underrated. Worth a visit if you are tired of the big names.
